meta.title: CCAFup — CCA-F Exam Prep Hub
meta.description: Unofficial community hub for CCA-F (Claude Certified Architect - Foundations) exam preparation

common.subscribeCta: Get daily practice questions in your inbox

examOverview.title: Exam Overview
examOverview.description: Get a comprehensive overview of the CCA-F (Claude Certified Architect - Foundations) exam structure and key information.

examInfo.title: Exam Information
examInfo.description: Learn about the exam format, registration process, cost, passing criteria, and other details for the CCA-F exam.

partner.title: Partner Network Guide
partner.description: Learn how to register and prepare for the exam through the Anthropic Partner Network.

dayGuide.title: Test Day Guide
dayGuide.description: Everything you need to know for test day — preparation checklist, environment setup, and important reminders.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about CCA-F exam preparation.

domains.title: Domain List
domains.description: Explore the 5 domains that make up the CCA-F exam, including their weight and key topics.

domainDetail.title: Domain Detail
domainDetail.description: Explore the detailed study content and key concepts for the selected domain.

scenarios.title: Scenario List
scenarios.description: Study real-world application scenarios that appear on the CCA-F exam.

scenarioDetail.title: Scenario Detail
scenarioDetail.description: Explore the detailed implementation methods and key points for the selected scenario.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.description: A curated list of key terms and concepts for the CCA-F exam.

roadmap.title: Prep Guide
roadmap.description: A step-by-step study roadmap and preparation strategy to help you pass the CCA-F exam.

cheatsheet.title: Cheatsheet
cheatsheet.description: A quick-reference summary sheet for last-minute review before the exam.

resources.title: Resources & Links
resources.description: A collection of official docs, study materials, and community links for CCA-F exam preparation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn about CCAFup's policies on data collection, usage, and protection.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Review the terms and conditions for using CCAFup services.

quiz.title: Practice Quiz
quiz.description: Test your CCA-F exam readiness with practice questions. Filter by domain and difficulty.

examPatterns.title: Exam Pattern Analysis
examPatterns.description: How CCA-F questions are structured — answer choice patterns, anti-pattern traps, and 5 key exam formulas.

comingSoon.quizDesc: Domain-based, scenario-based quizzes and full mock exams are coming soon.
comingSoon.dashboardDesc: Track your D-day countdown, study progress, and score trends at a glance.
comingSoon.communityDesc: Share experiences, ask questions, and find study groups — coming soon.

footer.disclaimer: CCAFup is an unofficial community hub and is not affiliated with Anthropic.
